plan.goal: Deliver the complete backend foundation for the new polling-based PRISM operator console UI: versioned REST reads for plans, task detail, and fleet utilization; a POST mutate endpoint that routes through the exact same authenticated mutation path and audit logging as MCP-triggered mutations; active local principal binding for human attribution; removal of legacy SSE/dashboard backend surfaces; and bundling of the built React UI assets into the Rust daemon binaries.
plan.title: Implement the operator console backend and bundled UI delivery
